enabled.description: Whether to generate forecast animations (GIFs per param and region).
enabled.title: Enabled

domains.description: Domains to generate animations for. Each entry is either a named domain (e.g. 'globe', 'europe', 'switzerland') defined in plotting.DOMAINS, or a custom domain dict with 'name', optional 'extent' [lon_min, lon_max, lat_min, lat_max], and optional 'projection'.
domains.title: Domains

frames_per_second.description: Frames per second for the output GIF animation.
frames_per_second.title: Frames Per Second

BaselineConfig.description: Configuration for a single baseline to include in the verification.

label.description: Label for the baseline that will be used in experiment results such as reports and figures.
label.title: Label

root.description: Root directory where the baseline data is stored.
root.title: Root

steps.description: Forecast steps to be used from baseline, e.g. '10/120/1'.
steps.title: Steps

member.description: Ensemble member to use: '000'/'control' for control, 'median' for the pre-computed median, 'mean' to average all members, or any 3-digit member ID. WARNING: when using 'median' with temporally aggregated parameters (e.g. 6-hourly precipitation), do NOT aggregate the hourly median — this introduces a significant negative bias. Instead, read the corresponding pre-aggregated median files (e.g. ..._median06h). Ensure the baseline data files match the aggregation period.
member.title: Member

BaselineConfig.title: BaselineConfig

stratification.description: Stratifications to include in the dashboard (any of season, region, init_hour)
stratification.title: Stratification

Dates.description: Start/stop of the hindcast period and the launch frequency.

start.description: First forecast initialisation as an ISO-8601 formatted string.
start.title: Start

end.description: Last forecast initialisation as an ISO-8601 formatted string.
end.title: End

frequency.description: Time between initialisations. Must be a combination of a number and a time unit (h or d).
frequency.title: Frequency

blacklist.description: Optional list of initialisation dates (ISO-8601) to exclude from processing.
blacklist.title: Blacklist

Dates.title: Dates

DefaultResources.description: Default resource settings for job execution.

gpus.description: Default GPU count per job (0 for non-GPU jobs).
gpus.title: Gpus

DefaultResources.title: DefaultResources

DomainConfig.description: A custom map domain defined by name, extent, and projection.

name.description: Name for the custom domain (used as wildcard).
name.title: Name

extent.description: Geographic extent as [lon_min, lon_max, lat_min, lat_max] in PlateCarree coordinates. None means full globe.
extent.title: Extent

projection.description: Projection name (must be a key in plotting._PROJECTIONS, e.g. 'orthographic').
projection.title: Projection

DomainConfig.title: DomainConfig

ExperimentConfig.description: Configuration for the experiment workflow outputs.

stratification.description: Spatial stratification settings for the analysis.

params.description: List of parameters to compute verification metrics for.
params.title: Params

thresholds.description: Dictionary mapping parameter names to threshold dicts. Each dict maps operator keys (gt, ge, lt, le, eq, ne) to lists of threshold values.
thresholds.title: Thresholds

scorecards.description: Scorecard generation configuration. Omit or set enabled: false to disable.

scoremaps.description: Score map plot configuration. Omit or set enabled: false to disable.

ExperimentConfig.title: ExperimentConfig

ExperimentScorecardConfig.description: Top-level scorecard block: a single enabled flag plus named scorecard sections.

sections.description: Named scorecard configurations (e.g. nowcasting, short_range, medium_range).
sections.title: Sections

ExperimentScorecardConfig.title: ExperimentScorecardConfig

ExplicitDates.description: Explicit list of initialisation dates as ISO-8601 formatted strings.
ExplicitDates.title: ExplicitDates

Ffv2Config.description: Configuration for the FFV2 scoring pipeline.

experiment_ids.description: Comma-separated experiment IDs passed to FFV2.
experiment_ids.title: Experiment Ids

veri_ens_member.description: Comma-separated ensemble member indices passed to FFV2, one per experiment ID (typically -1 for deterministic runs).
veri_ens_member.title: Veri Ens Member

catthresholds.description: Per-variable categorical thresholds for FFV2, mapping FFV2 variable names to lists of threshold values.
catthresholds.title: Catthresholds

pecthresholds.description: Per-variable PEC thresholds for FFV2, mapping FFV2 variable names to a dict with exactly one 'lower' and one 'upper' value.
pecthresholds.title: Pecthresholds

experiment_description.description: Short description of the experiment for FFV2 output files.
experiment_description.title: Experiment Description

file_description.description: File description string used in FFV2 output file naming.
file_description.title: File Description

domain_table.description: Path to the domain table file (polygon) used by FFV2.
domain_table.title: Domain Table

blacklists.description: Path to the blacklist directory used by FFV2.
blacklists.title: Blacklists

Ffv2Config.title: Ffv2Config

ForecasterConfig.description: Single training run stored in MLflow.

checkpoint.description: The model checkpoint to use. Can be an MLflow run URL, a Hugging Face `.ckpt` URL, or a local checkpoint path.
checkpoint.title: Checkpoint

label.description: The label for the run that will be used in experiment results such as reports and figures.
label.title: Label

steps.description: Forecast lead times in hours, formatted as 'start/end/step'. The range includes the start lead time and continues with the given step until reaching or exceeding the end lead time. Example: '0/120/6' for lead times every 6 hours up to 120 h, or '0/33/6' up to 30 h.
steps.title: Steps

extra_requirements.description: List of extra dependencies to install for this model. These will be added to the requirements.txt file in the run directory.
extra_requirements.title: Extra Requirements

inference_resources.description: Resource requirements for inference jobs (optional; defaults handled externally).

disable_local_eccodes_definitions.description: If true, the ECCODES_DEFINITION_PATH environment variable will not be set to the COSMO local definitions.
disable_local_eccodes_definitions.title: Disable Local Eccodes Definitions

config.description: Configuration for the forecaster run. Can be a dictionary of parameters or a path to a configuration file.By default, it will point to resources/inference/configs/forecaster.yaml in the evalml repository.
config.title: Config

ForecasterConfig.title: ForecasterConfig

GlobalResources.description:
Define resource limits that apply across all submissions.

This model is intended to specify global constraints, such as
the maximum number of GPUs that can be allocated in parallel,
regardless of individual job settings.

gpus.description: Maximum number of GPUs that may be used concurrently across all submissions.
gpus.title: Gpus

GlobalResources.title: GlobalResources

slurm_partition.description: The Slurm partition to use for inference jobs, e.g. 'short-shared'.
slurm_partition.title: Slurm Partition

cpus_per_task.description: Number of CPUs per task to request.
cpus_per_task.title: Cpus Per Task

mem_mb_per_cpu.description: Memory (in MB) per CPU to request.
mem_mb_per_cpu.title: Mem Mb Per Cpu

runtime.description: Maximum runtime for the job, e.g. '20m', '2h', '01:30:00'.
runtime.title: Runtime

Locations.description: Locations of data and services used in the workflow.

output_root.description: Root directory for all output files.
output_root.title: Output Root

Locations.title: Locations

MecConfig.description: Paths to input observation files for the MEC verification step.

ekf_root.description: Root directory for EKF SYNOP files. Files are expected at {ekf_root}/{YYYYMM}/ekfSYNOP_{init}00.nc.
ekf_root.title: Ekf Root

mon_synop_root.description: Root directory for monSYNOP files. Files are expected at {mon_synop_root}/{YYYYMMDDH}/monSYNOP.nc.
mon_synop_root.title: Mon Synop Root

ver_synop_root.description: Root directory for reference verSYNOP files. Files are expected at {ver_synop_root}/verSYNOP_{init}00.nc.
ver_synop_root.title: Ver Synop Root

MecConfig.title: MecConfig

enabled.description: Whether to generate meteograms (time series plots at stations).
enabled.title: Enabled

stations.description: List of PeakWeather station IDs to generate meteograms for.
stations.title: Stations

batch_rules.description: Define batches of the same rule that shall be executed within one job submission.
batch_rules.title: Batch Rules

leadtimes.description: Lead-time score figure settings (omit to skip).

meteogram.description: Publication meteogram case selection (omit to skip).

scoremaps.description: Publication scoremap figure settings (omit to skip). Requires a gridded (zarr) truth source.

PublicationLeadtimesConfig.description: Configuration for the publication lead-time figure.

enabled.description: Whether to generate the lead-time score figures.
enabled.title: Enabled

PublicationLeadtimesConfig.title: PublicationLeadtimesConfig

PublicationMeteogramConfig.description: Case selection for the publication meteogram figure.

enabled.description: Whether to generate the publication meteogram figure.
enabled.title: Enabled

init_time.description: Initialisation time (YYYYMMDDHHMM) of the case to plot.
init_time.title: Init Time

station.description: PeakWeather station ID to plot (e.g. KLO, GVE, LUG).
station.title: Station

params.description: Display parameters (one panel each); SP_10M/DD_10M are derived.
params.title: Params

PublicationMeteogramConfig.title: PublicationMeteogramConfig

PublicationScoremapsConfig.description: Configuration for the publication scoremap figures.

enabled.description: Whether to generate the publication scoremap figures.
enabled.title: Enabled

steps.description: Lead times in hours to produce one scoremap figure each. Defaults to experiment.scoremaps.leadtimes when omitted.
steps.title: Steps

params.description: Parameters to show as rows in the scoremap panel.
params.title: Params

scores.description: Score columns to show in the scoremap panel.
scores.title: Scores

baseline_label.description: Label of the baseline run to compare against.
baseline_label.title: Baseline Label

season.description: Season filter passed to the scoremap script.
season.title: Season

region.description: Geographic region for the scoremap plot.
region.title: Region

PublicationScoremapsConfig.title: PublicationScoremapsConfig

ScoreMapsConfig.description: Parameters controlling which score map plots are produced.

enabled.description: Whether to produce score maps (computationally intensive).
enabled.title: Enabled

params.description: List of parameters to plot. Supported values: T_2M, TD_2M, U_10M, V_10M, PS, PMSL, SP_10M (derived from U_10M/V_10M), TOT_PREC1, TOT_PREC6, TOT_PREC24 (period-accumulated precipitation, period encoded in the name).
params.title: Params

leadtimes.description: List of lead times (hours) to plot.
leadtimes.title: Leadtimes

scores.description: List of verification scores to plot. Supported: BIAS, RMSE, MAE.
scores.title: Scores

regions.description: List of regions to plot (e.g. switzerland, centraleurope).
regions.title: Regions

init_hours.description: List of initialization hours to plot. Use 'all' for the unstratified view, or zero-padded hour strings like '00', '06', '12', '18'.
init_hours.title: Init Hours

ScoreMapsConfig.title: ScoreMapsConfig

ScorecardConfig.description: Configuration for a single named scorecard.

baseline.description: Baseline label to compare against (must match the `label` field of a baseline entry in `runs`).
baseline.title: Baseline

stratification.description: Dimension to use as scorecard columns (e.g. 'region').
stratification.title: Stratification

variables.description: Variables and metrics as scorecard rows (VAR:M1,M2 format). An empty list [] is accepted by the schema but falls back to a hard-coded RMSE-only set (U_10M, V_10M, T_2M, PMSL, TD_2M, TOT_PREC). Omit ':...' after a variable name to include all available metrics for it.
variables.title: Variables

ScorecardConfig.title: ScorecardConfig

params.description: List of parameters to generate animations and meteograms for.
params.title: Params

regions.description: List of region names for stratification. Empty list means no spatial stratification.
regions.title: Regions

root.description: Root directory where the region shapefiles are stored. Required when regions is non-empty.
root.title: Root

checkpoint.description: The model checkpoint to use. Can be an MLflow run URL, a Hugging Face `.ckpt` URL, or a local checkpoint path.
checkpoint.title: Checkpoint

label.description: The label for the run that will be used in experiment results such as reports and figures.
label.title: Label

steps.description: Forecast lead times in hours, formatted as 'start/end/step'. The range includes the start lead time and continues with the given step until reaching or exceeding the end lead time. Example: '0/120/6' for lead times every 6 hours up to 120 h, or '0/33/6' up to 30 h.
steps.title: Steps

extra_requirements.description: List of extra dependencies to install for this model. These will be added to the requirements.txt file in the run directory.
extra_requirements.title: Extra Requirements

inference_resources.description: Resource requirements for inference jobs (optional; defaults handled externally).

disable_local_eccodes_definitions.description: If true, the ECCODES_DEFINITION_PATH environment variable will not be set to the COSMO local definitions.
disable_local_eccodes_definitions.title: Disable Local Eccodes Definitions

config.description: Configuration for the temporal downscaler run. Can be a dictionary of parameters or a path to a configuration file. By default, it will point to resources/inference/configs/temporal_downscaler.yaml in the evalml repository.

forecaster.description: Configuration for the forecaster run that this temporal downscaler is based on.

TruthConfig.description: Configuration for the truth data used in the verification.

label.description: Label that will be used in experiment results such as reports and figures.
label.title: Label

root.description: Path to the root of the dataset.
root.title: Root

TruthConfig.title: TruthConfig

description.description: Description of the experiment, e.g. 'Hindcast of the 2023 season.'
description.title: Description

config_label.description: Optional label for the experiment that will be used in the experiment directory name. Defaults to the config file name if not provided.
config_label.title: Config Label

runs.description: List of experiment participants, including forecaster/temporal downscaler ML runs and baselines.
runs.title: Runs

lapse_rate_correction.description: Apply standard-atmosphere lapse-rate correction to T_2M.
lapse_rate_correction.title: Lapse Rate Correction

experiment.description: Settings for the experiment workflow outputs.

mec.description: Input observation paths for the MEC verification step. Required when running with --mec.

ffv2.description: Configuration for the FFV2 scoring pipeline. Required when running with --ffv2.
